subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Best-Beloved, Who through His supreme benevolence hath distinguished the Most Glorious Countenance as a sacrifice for the life of the people of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را سزا که نظر بعنایت کبری طلعت ابهی را مخصوص حیوه اهل عالم فدا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @personal instructions, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
